settings.label: Default social sharing image
settings.info: Shown when pages are shared on Facebook, Pinterest, Twitter/X and used as the Organization logo. Recommended 1200 x 630 px.

settings.label: Google Search Console verification code
settings.info: Paste only the content value from the meta tag (e.g. AbC123...), not the full tag.

settings.label: Bing Webmaster verification code
settings.info: The content value from the msvalidate.01 meta tag.

settings.label: Pinterest domain verification code
settings.info: The content value from the p:domain_verify meta tag.
